label: Think node crawl interrupt
description: Alternates the crawling pawn between active crawl ticks and rest-pause ticks. Controls the rhythm via two IntRange durations.

crawlDurationTicksRange.label: Crawl duration ticks range
crawlDurationTicksRange.description: Random range in ticks for how long the pawn actively crawls before the next rest pause.

ticksBetweenCrawlsRange.label: Ticks between crawls range
ticksBetweenCrawlsRange.description: Random range in ticks for how long the pawn rests between crawl bursts.
